title: MirrorConfig
description: A service mirror — the projection of a [`ServiceConfig`] onto concrete infra. Lives at `.yah/services/<svc>/mirrors/<env>.toml`.

providers.description: Provider slots, keyed by role (`"static"`, `"compute"`, …). Each value either references a provider declared under `.yah/infra/providers/` or inlines a local-only provider (no creds, no infra file).

MirrorProviderSlot.description: A provider slot inside a [`MirrorConfig`]. Two shapes: - **Reference** (`use = "<provider-id>"`) — point at an infra-declared provider; extra fields are slot-specific (bucket, zone, dns, …). - **Inline** (`kind = "local-*"`) — for providers that need no infra declaration because they carry no credentials.

MirrorShape.description: Topological shape of a mirror — how its providers sit relative to each other.

oneOf.description: Single machine hosts compute (and any non-Cloudflare-fronted static).
Operator-local dev mirror — static via built-in file server, compute via the local container runtime.
Multi-machine deployment (machines listed per provider slot).

Provider.description:
Tag for the infrastructure provider kind. Drives which fields are valid in a [`ProviderConfig`] body or a [`MirrorProviderSlot::Inline`] block.

Two flavors: - **Account/runtime providers** (`cloudflare`, `hetzner`, `local-container`) live as files under `.yah/infra/providers/<id>.toml` and are referenced from a mirror via `use = "<id>"`. - **Inline-only providers** (`local-static`, `caddy-container`, `minio-container`) declare an operator-local stand-in directly inside a mirror via `kind = "..."`. They carry no credentials and have no provider file. The container-backed kinds ride on top of whichever `local-container` runtime is declared in infra (orbstack/colima/docker); the reconciler resolves the runtime at up-time.

oneOf.description: Cloudflare account: R2 buckets, DNS, Workers, Tunnels.
Built-in static-file server bound to localhost. Inline-only; never declared as a standalone provider file because it carries no creds.
Local container runtime (orbstack/colima/docker). Configured by a provider file under `.yah/infra/providers/` so the discovery hints + runtime override sit in one place.

Containerized Caddy fronting an object store — the local-sim stand-in for a CDN-fronted static surface (`cloudflare` in prod). Inline-only; the reconciler spins up the container on the local-container runtime and points Caddy's origin at the sibling `object_store` slot.

Containerized MinIO providing an S3-compatible API — the local-sim stand-in for Cloudflare R2. Inline-only; the reconciler spins up the container on the local-container runtime and auto-creates the declared bucket on first up.
